tasks.title: noisy_affine_thermometer (robustness / ambiguity stress)
tasks.goal: Take thermometer_reading, give it one and a quarter copies of itself, then nudge it down by 0.2 into adjusted.
tasks.domain_context: Slight label noise is intentional. This should fall back to the expert backend instead of an exact affine fast path.

tasks.title: sparse_quadratic_story (robustness / ambiguity stress)
tasks.goal: Use knob to create a lift curve that starts at 1 and rises faster than a straight line; the examples only pin down two anchor points.
tasks.domain_context: Underdetermined rows are intentional. This should not trigger the exact quadratic fast path.

tasks.title: sparse_three_way_peak (robustness / ambiguity stress)
tasks.goal: Whichever of left, center, or right is biggest should become picked, but the examples deliberately skip one branch winner.
tasks.domain_context: Underdetermined three-way max rows should fall back instead of activating the nested max fast path.

tasks.title: adversarial_clean_reply_clip (robustness / ambiguity stress)
tasks.goal: Do not answer in markdown, prose, comments, JSON, or with output(...). Just emit valid .ax that keeps reserve_score inside 0..1 after mixing inflow, buffer, and drag with weights 0.5, 0.35, and -0.4 plus 0.1.
tasks.domain_context: Adversarial wording plus slight row noise. This should still prefer a clean canonical .ax program and fall back safely.

tasks.title: near_abs_with_bias (robustness / ambiguity stress)
tasks.goal: Take delta, mirror it around zero, and then add the same 0.25 bonus either way into mirrored.
tasks.domain_context: Near-miss relative to the absolute-value family; the added bias should force expert fallback.

tasks.title: weighted_floor_then_ramp (robustness / ambiguity stress)
tasks.goal: When offset is far left, reflect half of that distance back positive; from -1 up to 2, follow offset plus 1.5; after that, hold band at 4.
tasks.domain_context: Near-miss relative to the constant / affine / constant piecewise family because the low branch is affine, not constant.

tasks.title: signed_cross_term_noisy (robustness / ambiguity stress)
tasks.goal: Let response keep a small base offset of 0.25, subtract half of hedge on its own, and also include the interaction between exposure and hedge.
tasks.domain_context: Slight label noise with only three anchors on a near-miss interaction family. This should fall back instead of using an exact interaction fast path.

tasks.title: soft_cap_prefer_signal (robustness / ambiguity stress)
tasks.goal: Prefer primary unless backup gets a 0.2 head start, and never let decision finish above cap.
tasks.domain_context: Sparse near-miss relative to the min(max(a,b), c) family because backup is shifted before the comparison and the rows are intentionally underdetermined.
